name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 14 Oct 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.124"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Updated MyFastway to send the article number as the tracking number, so orders can be tracked correctly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug on the purchase order page where status was not filtering correctly."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where eBay listings were identified as having an active promotion when they didn't, which prevented some details from updating."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where Toll Priority shipping label barcodes were not to Toll's specifications."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
